_comment: Cross-language Langfuse trace-URL contract (OBS-9 / spec gap 6.3). The CLI's langfuseTraceUrl(projectId, traceId) and intel's langfuse_trace_url(project_id, trace_id) MUST both produce the `url` below for the given (projectId, traceId) on the Langfuse Cloud host. This file is duplicated byte-for-byte in meetless-cli/packages/cli/test/fixtures/langfuse-url-fixtures.json and intel/tests/fixtures/langfuse-url-fixtures.json. Keep them identical; if a builder drifts, its own language's suite fails against these rows.
